info.text: Progress can require a lot of effort.

info.text: Progress can be something others observe.

info.text: Progress can be a give and take.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We don't need to stand still.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Things are bound to get even shakier before they get better.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress can be a lot of fun.

info.text: Let's not get ahead of ourselves.
